doc_title: Waters of the United States — EPA/Army Corps Final Rule
label: partial
reason: The January 2023 WOTUS rule and Sackett reference are real, but the "permit-by-rule" language, "hobby-landowner" framing, and overly definitive phrasing about exemptions appear non-standard or invented for this purported regulatory text.
